CustomField.description:
Auto calculated.
If Certified: [Eligibility Date] - [Income Certification Start Date] If Failed/Withdrawn/Cert On Hold/Cert Expired: [Date Terminated / Withdrawn / On Hold] - [Income Certification Start Date]
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Auto calculated.
If Certified: [Eligibility Date] - [Income Certification Start Date] If Failed/Withdrawn/Cert On Hold/Cert Expired: [Date Terminated / Withdrawn / On Hold] - [Income Certification Start Date]
CustomField.label: CGP&H Days to Complete Income Cert
